name: agenticow
description: Git for Agent Memory: Copy-On-Write vector branching for embedded multi-agent memory. Branch a base memory in ~0.5ms / 162 bytes regardless of base size — 83x faster, 3000x smaller than full-copy snapshots. Exact read-through queries (parent ∪ edits, child wins).

scripts.examples: for f in red-team-sandbox multi-persona-consensus time-travel-debug multi-tenant-saas personalization rollback-quarantine checkpointing git-workflow ab-branches parallel-agents promotion-pipeline compliance-lineage ab-at-scale parallel-selves memory-evolution simulated-org; do echo "\n══ $f ══"; node examples/$f.mjs; done
scripts.examples:production: for f in red-team-sandbox multi-persona-consensus time-travel-debug multi-tenant-saas; do echo "\n══ $f ══"; node examples/$f.mjs; done
scripts.examples:platform: for f in promotion-pipeline compliance-lineage ab-at-scale; do echo "\n══ $f ══"; node examples/$f.mjs; done
scripts.examples:exotic: for f in parallel-selves memory-evolution simulated-org; do echo "\n══ $f ══"; node examples/$f.mjs; done

author: ruvnet
